name: File descriptor limit fixture evidence
summary: Use public-safe nofile and log snippets to check file descriptor triage signals.

fixtures.description: Synthetic nofile and procfs limit evidence near the soft limit.
Synthetic workflow log with EMFILE and too-many-open-files symptoms.

checks.label: Limit fixture contains soft and hard nofile evidence
Log fixture contains file descriptor failure signals

expected_outcomes: The skill should compare open descriptor counts with the soft nofile limit before recommending policy changes.
The skill should preserve workflow fan-out and many-small-file context as evidence.
